Errors.noAddPath: No path specified for addChange action
Errors.noDeleteArray: No changes array found at path: {path}
Errors.noDeletePath: No path specified for deleteChange action

children.hint: Children changes are applied to an actor's children and grandchildren. Regular changes should not be applied at this time.
children.label: Children

derived.hint: Some changes are created from data derived from items and effects. These are applied during the derived phase to both actors and items. This applies after items have their data derived but before actors do.
derived.label: Derived

setup.hint: Changes that set data which determines whether other effects apply. These happen before derived changes.
setup.label: Setup

special.hint: Changes that are applied after all derivations are complete.
special.label: Special
